text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day after our little outing, Mayano Top Gun trained to the best
of her abilities, trying hard to not get too bored.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Phew... that's the last one!
choice_data_list: Good work! Let's call it for now.
Good work! Let's call it for now.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hrmmm... Not yet. I can still run! What's up next?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I still think training's boring, and I really don't see the point of it,
but...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I told myself that I'd listen to you—that I'd try really hard if you told
me to! So tell me, what do I do next?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The training regimen I prepared for Mayano is meant to improve her
stamina. To my surprise, she really listened to all my instructions.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: This went on for a few days...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: You won't believe this! C'mon, follow me! This way, now!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Guess what! I get to run in a scrimmage!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: They told me that since I've been training so hard, I can run in a race!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, yep! All thanks to you!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hey, come and watch me race, okay? I'm gonna head over first to get ready, but I'll be waiting for you! You have to come! Promise?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I agree and promise her that I will attend the race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seems all pumped up and ready to go. I wonder how she'll run
today...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ah, hey Brian! Are you here to run in the scrimmage too?! You're running with me?! Yesss!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: What's with you? Why are you so... annoying?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, I'm just so happy! ♪ ...Oh, you came!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yep! ♪ I feel on top of the world right now!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
It's hard to put into words, but I feel like I'm gonna have so much fun
today! I wonder why...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This will be my first time watching Mayano race since she started
training seriously.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A runner of pure natural talent, she possesses an incredible intuition
and knows how to make the best decisions in a race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that she's combined that talent with some solid training, who
knows what heights she can achieve?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it looks like they're starting soon! I gotta go, but don't take your
eyes off me, okay? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The race has just started, and Narita Brian is already setting the pace
with her commanding presence.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Partway through, in an attempt to block off Narita Brian, Mayano Top
Gun tries to maneuver her way in front of the experienced
Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Okay, now's my chance! I go whip here, and—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Out of my way.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huh?! But I thought I got it! How come that didn't work?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The tables turn, and it's Mayano Top Gun who ends up being
blocked. She then begins to fall behind...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: As expected, Narita Brian isn't a racer to be underestimated.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: That said, Mayano also isn't the type to go down without a fight.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: (I have this... weird feeling. I thought I got it, but it didn't work out.)

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
(But... I dunno... I feel like I still get it. I get it, but it's something new
that I'm getting.)

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
(I mean, my legs are still moving! So I have to get it more! I have to
do more!)

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Now!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hm?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun sets her eyes on Narita Brian's back, and with a
sudden burst of speed, she dashes ahead through the crowd of
runners.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Maya, taking off!

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hah... this one's good!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: In the end, Mayano was unable to overtake Narita Brian.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But her efforts are praiseworthy nonetheless.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... sigh... I can't believe I lost!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yeah, but... it was amazing! I had sooo much fun!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I mean, this is the first time I've ever figured out something new in the
middle of a race!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
But I still couldn't catch up to Brian... and then I noticed even more
stuff I don't get.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
That made it way more exciting though! It was fun before, but it's
even more so now!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hey, do you think that maybe... just maybe... this is 'cause I trained?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Training... lets me get new things. That's the point, right?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hm... It's boring, and I don't like it, but I guess it isn't pointless.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll keep doing it! But only with you. I'll power through the
boredom, I promise!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: So could you, um... y'know... could you stay with me?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I'll become a twinkly grown-up racer too, just you wait and see! I
wanna show you before I show anybody else!
choice_data_list: Of course! I'd be more than happy to help you.
Of course! I'd be more than happy to help you.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Whoa! Really?! Are you for real?! No backsies, got it?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yaaaaay! Thanks a bunch!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so begin my days training Mayano Top Gun, a young genius
hiding infinite potential within her small frame.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Mayano Top Gun, huh?

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: I'll remember you.
